---
title: "data_hmwk_03"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#Actividad filter()

library(dplyr)

starwars %>%
  filter(species == "Droid", height < 150)
```

```{r}
#Ordenamiento de filas con arrange()

starwars %>%
  filter(species == "Droid", height < 150) %>%
  arrange(desc(mass))
```

```{r}
#mutate()

starwars %>%
  mutate(
    altura_cm = height * 1,
    masa_gr = mass * 1000
  )
```

```{r}
#Seleccion de columnas con selct()
starwars %>%
  select(name, height, ends_with("color"))
```

```{r}
#Agrupacion y Resumen group_by() y sumarise()

starwars %>%
  group_by(homeworld) %>%
  summarise(
    total_personajes = n()
  )
```
